name: mempalace-dotnet
description: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 22 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, Chroma + SQLite backends.

interface.shortDescription: AI memory system for Codex (.NET port)
interface.longDescription: Give your AI a persistent memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace backed by ChromaDB or SQLite, with 22 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided skills.
defaultPrompt: Search my memories for recent decisions
Mine this project into my memory palace
Show my palace status and room counts
